positive: A whimsical, stylized woodland scene rendered in deep indigo and bright emerald tones. Focus on a central, majestic silhouette of a group of stylized forest animals (deer, foxes, badgers) gathered around glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The composition must be circular and contained, suitable for a t-shirt print. Utilize clean line art and a strong negative space contrast, mimicking a sophisticated woodblock print or engraved tattoo style. Dramatic, diffused lighting emanating only from the flora, casting deep shadows and sharp outlines. Overhead view, symmetrical composition, vector illustration aesthetic, high contrast, detailed foliage, ethereal, mystical.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, watermark, text, logo, copyright, cartoon, graffiti, ugly, low detail, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, oil painting
